name: Barbecued Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, dry mustard, chili sauce, vinegar, and brown sugar in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Place the seasoned pork chops in a glass baking dish.
3. Pour the mixture over the pork chops, covering them completely.
4. Cover the dish with foil or a lid and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 1-1/2 hours.
5. Uncover the dish during the last 30 minutes of cooking time.
6. If needed, add water to make gravy.
